@kody/manage_memory.name: ManageMemory
@kody/manage_memory.title: The Scribe

@kody/rar_remote_agent.name: RAR Remote Agent
@kody/rar_remote_agent.title: The Sentinel

abilities.text: The native client for the RAPP Agent Registry. Discover, search, install, vote, review, and submit single-file agents from the open RAR ecosystem. Runs autonomously under the brainstem.

@kody/rar_remote_agent.flavor_text: “No API key required. No excuses accepted.”
